metadata.title: Product Capabilities
metadata.description: Outcome-based product capabilities for the Platform Engineering domain, centered on developer self-service, runtime foundations, secure delivery, and engineering insight.

definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based ability that delivers customer or business value.
definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product capabilities.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each capability now carries only capability-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that capability.

capabilities.name: Find the Right Platform Path
capabilities.description: Help developers understand which services, standards, and ownership boundaries apply to their work.

flows.title: Find the Right Platform Path
flows.description: Help developers understand which services, standards, and ownership boundaries apply to their work.

steps.title: Open developer portal
keyFacts: Open developer portal is a meaningful step in the developer journey flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when open developer portal feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.

dependencies.name: Developer Portal and Service Catalog
dependencies.description: The front door to the platform, combining service catalog metadata, documentation, ownership, templates, and self-service actions.

steps.title: Find service template
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

steps.title: Set up local workspace

Errors here create rework and reduce confidence in the product model.

steps.title: Start development flow

Small friction at this point creates disproportionate conversion loss.

steps.title: Spot capacity pressure
keyFacts: Spot capacity pressure is a meaningful step in the reliability journey flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when spot capacity pressure feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.
